title: ranunculus microphyllus
intro: Ranunculus microphyllus, also known as small-leaved buttercup, is a flowering plant species in the Ranunculaceae family. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as antibacterial and antifungal activities. Ranunculus microphyllus can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically to support skin health and wound healing.
